ADMIN_EMAILS.reason: Server-side admin allowlist consumed by the web runtime.

ADMIN_SHARD_COUNT.reason: Server-side admin shard health setting consumed by the web runtime.

ADMIN_SHARD_SLOW_RUN_MS.reason: Server-side admin shard health setting consumed by the web runtime.

ADMIN_SHARD_STALE_MINUTES.reason: Server-side admin shard health setting consumed by the web runtime.

BETTER_STACK_INGESTING_HOST.reason: Server-side logging endpoint used by the web runtime.

BETTER_STACK_SOURCE_TOKEN.reason: Server-side logging credential consumed by the web runtime.

HOME_SERVER_STATS_API_KEY.reason: Admin-only home-server API credential consumed by the web runtime.

HOME_SERVER_STATS_URL.reason: Admin-only home-server API endpoint consumed by the web runtime.

NEXT_PUBLIC_SENTRY_DSN.reason: Sentry DSNs are client configuration, not write credentials.

NEXT_PUBLIC_NUTSNEWS_IOS_APP_STORE_URL.reason: Public app-store link rendered by the web runtime.

NEXT_PUBLIC_NUTSNEWS_RUNTIME_ENV.reason: Public runtime identity used to gate browser telemetry.

NEXT_PUBLIC_NUTSNEWS_SIDE_EFFECTS_MODE.reason: Public side-effect mode used to gate browser telemetry.

NEXT_PUBLIC_TURNSTILE_SITE_KEY.reason: Public Cloudflare Turnstile site key used by the contact form.

NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY.reason: Supabase public anon key; database policy remains the security boundary.

NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL.reason: Supabase project URL used by browser code and server-side admin dashboards.

NUTSNEWS_EDGE_FEED_SNAPSHOT_URL.reason: Worker edge snapshot endpoint consumed by the web runtime.

NUTSNEWS_DATA_ENV.reason: Declared non-secret data-environment identity for runtime validation.

NUTSNEWS_PRODUCTION_SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF.reason: Known non-secret production project identity used to reject staging mismatches.

NUTSNEWS_RUNTIME_ENV.reason: Declared non-secret runtime identity for side-effect policy enforcement.

NUTSNEWS_SIDE_EFFECTS_MODE.reason: Declared non-secret side-effect mode for runtime policy enforcement.

NUTSNEWS_SUPABASE_CREDENTIALS_ENV.reason: Declared non-secret credential-environment identity for runtime validation.

NUTSNEWS_SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF.reason: Declared non-secret Supabase project identity for runtime validation.

RESEND_API_KEY.reason: Contact email delivery credential consumed by the web runtime.

TURNSTILE_SECRET_KEY.reason: Cloudflare Turnstile verification credential consumed by the web runtime.

OPENAI_API_KEY.reason: Worker-owned credential; no current VPS web runtime usage. Review before enabling.

OPENAI_INPUT_COST_PER_1M_TOKENS.reason: Cost-estimation metadata with no current application or VPS consumer.

OPENAI_INPUT_TOKENS_PER_REVIEW_ESTIMATE.reason: Cost-estimation metadata with no current application or VPS consumer.

OPENAI_OUTPUT_COST_PER_1M_TOKENS.reason: Cost-estimation metadata with no current application or VPS consumer.

OPENAI_OUTPUT_TOKENS_PER_REVIEW_ESTIMATE.reason: Cost-estimation metadata with no current application or VPS consumer.

ACTIONS_READ_TOKEN.reason: Optional server-side GitHub Actions read credential used by the admin production-readiness dashboard.

AUTH_GOOGLE_ID.reason: Auth.js Google OAuth client identifier consumed by the VPS server runtime.

AUTH_GOOGLE_SECRET.reason: Auth.js Google OAuth client secret consumed by the VPS server runtime.

AUTH_SECRET.reason: Auth.js session/encryption secret required by the VPS server runtime.

SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN.reason: Vercel build/source-map credential; not a VPS runtime credential.

SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY.reason: Privileged server-only Supabase credential required by VPS admin dashboards and readiness checks; never exposed to browser code.

NEXT_PUBLIC_VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_SHA.reason: Deployment metadata; it is not stable VPS configuration.

patterns.reason: Preview/development configuration must not enter VPS production.
Browser-only or service-specific configuration requires an explicit consumer review.
